Spark Playbook · Sprint 3 · Backlog #23

Topic-page shell — screenshot review

Desktop (1440×900) and mobile (390×844) captures of the redesigned topic-page shell running locally against the partitioning-shuffle topic. Tap any screenshot to open it full size.

Known gap: the mobile captures show the shell is not actually responsive — the fixed two-pane desktop layout is simply squeezed at 390px width, producing heavy text wrapping in the left pane. This wasn't part of backlog #23's stated acceptance criteria (a local, desktop-first tool), so it's a known limitation rather than a defect — flagged here rather than silently omitted.

Desktop

1440 × 900
Default — Concept tab, idle cluster

Fresh load of the Partitioning & Shuffle topic page. Idle state pill, breadcrumb, tab strip.

 Cluster-config drawer open

Relocated Phase 1 controls. Ranges read Workers 1-5, Cores 1-4, Memory (GB) 1-8, Shuffle partitions 1-300 — matches the locked US-SH2 values.

 Breadcrumb topic switcher open

Lists all 4 built topics (partitioning-shuffle, join-strategies, bucketing, aqe) with the current one marked.

 Notebook tab

Walkthrough steps parsed from the topic's own notebook.ipynb markdown headings.
